import io
import string
import list

fn add_unique(_ acc: List<Int>, _ n: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(acc, n)
    acc
  else
    list.push(acc, n)
  end
end

fn collect(_ line: String, _ acc: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = acc
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = add_unique(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_one(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = xs
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_one(remaining, m)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let empty: List<Int> = []
let after1 = collect(line1, empty)
let combined = collect(line2, after1)
let sorted = sort_asc(combined)

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
while idx < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
